caption: A large assembly of people is gathered in a tiered auditorium, likely a legislative or parliamentary hall, with rows of green upholstered benches. The attendees are predominantly men wearing a variety of attire, including white button-down shirts, traditional Indian kurtas, and some in darker suits or jackets. Many individuals are seated, while some stand or lean forward, engaged in conversation or listening. The scene remains static across the frames, with the composition of people and their positions barely shifting, suggesting a period of waiting or attentive listening. No on-screen text, logos, or specialized equipment are visible, and the lighting is consistent and bright across the entire seating area. The focus remains on the dense crowd filling the benches, with individuals scattered across multiple levels of the tiered seating.
